title: Arch Capital (ACGL) Up 26% YTD: Will the Bull Run Continue?
text: New business opportunities, rate increases, growth in existing accounts and solid capital position continue to drive Arch Capital (ACGL).

title: Arch Capital Group: Performing Well In A Difficult Environment
text: Arch Capital generates an earnings beat for the third time out of the last four quarters. Replacing Twitter in the S&P 500 is a positive catalyst for the company, which jumped 8 percent on the news.
